title: Cobblemon Fusiomon 🧬✨
description:
🔥 Introducing a brand-new Cobblemon Fusion Datapack!
Unleash the power of DNA fusion and discover never-before-seen Cobblemon forms! 🧬✨
body:
🔥 Discover a brand-new Cobblemon Fusion Datapack!
Unleash the power of DNA fusion and discover never-before-seen Pokémon forms! 🧬✨

⚠️ Early Access: The project is still in development; only a few Fusions are available at the moment (see the gallery for details). More are on the way!

🔧 Requirements: This datapack depends on Mega Showdown, so make sure it's installed.

📦 Important: This project includes a Datapack and a Resource Pack.
Make sure to install the files in your datapack and resourcepack folders for everything to work properly.

🐎 Ride On: Some Fusiomon are fully rideable! Saddle up and explore the world; don't forget to install Cobblemon Ride On. ⚙️🔥

🧪 How to fuse: Deposit specific fusion items into the recovery tanks (like the one used for Mewtwo). Each required item is listed in the gallery.

🌐 Available languages: English and French

💬 Got a great fusion idea? We'd love to hear your suggestions!
We're just getting started... 👀

⚠️ **For the datapack to work properly, you need to put a copy of the .zip file located in the "datapack" folder into the "Resourcepack" folder**
